1.label: 1st Grade
1.description: Add and subtract within 20. Understand place value for tens and ones.

2.label: 2nd Grade
2.description: Add and subtract within 100. Understand place value to 1000. Foundations for multiplication.

3.label: 3rd Grade
3.description: Multiply and divide within 100. Understand fractions as numbers. Add and subtract within 1000.

examples.expression: \text{What fraction of the circle is shaded if 2 out of 4 parts are shaded?}

4.label: 4th Grade
4.description: Multi-digit arithmetic. Equivalent fractions, add/subtract fractions with like denominators. Factors and multiples.

examples.expression: \text{A box has 24 crayons. If you share them equally among 6 friends, how many does each friend get?}

5.label: 5th Grade
5.description: Decimals through thousandths. Add/subtract fractions with unlike denominators. Multiply/divide fractions. Order of operations.

6.label: 6th Grade
6.description: Ratios and proportions. Divide fractions by fractions. Negative numbers. Expressions and equations.

examples.expression: \text{If 3 apples cost \$2.25, how much do 7 apples cost?}

7.label: 7th Grade
7.description: Proportional relationships. Operations with rational numbers. Linear expressions and equations.

examples.expression: \text{A shirt is 20\% off its original price of \$35. What is the sale price?}

8.label: 8th Grade
8.description: Irrational numbers. Integer exponents. Linear equations and functions. Systems of equations.

examples.expression: \text{A line passes through (0, 3) and (2, 7). What is its slope?}
